target: 60. 14 Years Ago Part 1
May 25th
…What?

Shinpei! This place is the Western Food Kofune!
Even if the loop point shifted, we ended up here?!
We were in such a spot?!

Something's wrong.
The scenery feels off…

Hey, wait a second!
Wait! Sister!!

!! That voice…
Could it be… Nagumo Sensei?!

It doesn't matter what's going on!
Shinpei! Let's chase those two now!
Yeah… huh?

(!! 
The scene changed!?)
Hey~ It's busy today!

Oh! 
Welcome, Hizuru-san! Ryunosuke!

!!  
It's really those two… Hizuru-san and…
Twin brother <color=#GF_TIPS_036>Ryunosuke</color> san!!!
What the heck is going on?!

When I died first…
Something similar happened.

Welcome! 
Two people?

Hey, why are you wearing an apron?!
Akemi-san!

Today's the 10th anniversary of Western Food Kofune opening! 
That's why everyone on the island is coming to eat here.

Oh, really?!
Congratulations!!

Thank you~ 
That's why I'm helping out too.
O… Mom…

Seriously! It's Akemi-san!!
Wow!!!
This must be the past…!

(The 10th anniversary decorations are displayed.
The date is May 25, 2004---fourteen years ago!!!)

When I first died,
Mio was nearby and this happened!

I was at the private beach where you died…
Witnessing past events.

That's Mio's memory…?
So this is Nagumo Sensei's memories!
??

Western Food Kofune 10th Anniversary!!
Congratulations!!!

Oh, Tooru! Masahito!
Thank you!

Alan…
Um… always delicious.
I hope it stays the same from now on too.

Did you look in a mirror?!
Beard! 
And your sleeping habits!

Ah… sorry…
I forgot.

Even Dad came!!
There was a day like this, huh?

Yeah… amazing…
It's moving.
What did Shinpei's parents do for work?
Underwater archaeologist. A job diving underwater.
How has Tooru been lately?
I was thinking of going down to the spot I mentioned earlier…
Huh!

Hitogashima Island has a rich history and is interesting…
It was great to move here.
The food's delicious too!
(The sounds… gestures of the two…)

Sister…
Cheer up already.

Hmph!
I didn't want to talk with you anyway.

But…
You said your friend came over, right?
What's so strange about that?

But…
You can't believe it, right? 
There are only 20 students in the whole school.
Where would you meet someone new?
Takanosu Mountain.
(The scene changed again…!)

Shinpei!
This place is…
Ah… the old Hishigata Clinic.

Really meeting here?
Who's that kid? 
Is she from this island?
Probably.
"Probably"?!
Also… probably not from this time.

You'll know when you meet her. She always appears at this time.
There she is, coming down from the second floor.

It's definitely a ghost!
I heard there are ghosts here!!
She isn't coming…

Let's go home soon?
It'll be dangerous on the way back in the dark.
I made a promise to meet her today. I have to keep it.

I'll go home first?
If this is the case, sister… you won't move even if pulled by force.

(Ryunosuke left first,
leaving only Sensei behind--)
Shinpei… what's that?!
Good evening, Heine.

Welcome to the white beach of Omoto 
Coming from deep below, far away.

The fish that's lost its way appears in your eyes
Like a human… like Hiruko-sama.
I'm sorry, Hizuru.
What?

I wanted to meet your brother
But I said it, yet…
When the time comes…
There's no need for you to do things you don't want.

…I think I'm fine with just Hizuru…
You're different from others, Hizuru.

Different?
Me?!

Everyone gets scared and runs away when they see me, 
but you don't run. You chase after me.
There are rumors about ghosts in the old ward

Kukuku… 
That's why they say it's not allowed to meet like this.
Who?
It's Shide-sama!
Shide-sama… who is that?

Umm, I don't really want to say it but…
I'll tell you a little since it's Hizuru.

Shide-sama has desires and is with two people!
That's why… they have four arms

Four…
Shide… four hands… paper streamers.
That's the one with Four Arms!
Mmm!

Ah… right…
I brought it. Here.
Peppermint candy

Oh! This is this!
Thank you, Hizuru!!
I was curious about the taste!
June 10th
Did we jump to another day?

Shinpei… that kid…
Is it really this Heine?!

I don't know.
But I need to see the end of this memory
What's wrong, Hizuru?!
I cut my finger a little…
Are you okay?!
I'm fine.
Show me!
What's wrong? You're spacing out.
Heine?
Hmm…
Wait, Heine? It's ticklish…
June 18th
Today you didn't have enough snacks.

I hate it… I really do…
Hate that…

You've been looking pale lately.
Eat something other than my sweets---
…Heine?

I can't eat anything…
Starving to death…

The adults who went fishing died… 
No fish could be caught.

When summer came, my father…
my mother…, and siblings all…
Everyone… everyone is dead now…
They starved to death…
Hizuru. The Shadow too…
W-why… even my shadow… pet it…
Huh?
Just do it.
…Like this?
Mm… fuh…

It's warm, isn't it…  
Your hand…
Can the shadow tell?
Yeah.
Next time, I'll bring more food.
…Thank you, Hizuru…
Stay my friend forever…
July 7th
(Cicadas are chirping… It seems summer has come…)
Hey.
Huh?

That girl from the Minakata family…?  
What are you doing in a place like this?!
I'm walking.

You don't need to look, you know!  
It's dangerous!  
This area has pit vipers!
…Then why are you okay?

I'm not fine!  
That's why I'm doing this…  
I'm the one removing them, right?!

It's interfering with work!!  
If you're walking, walk on the path!

Where did my sister go?  
She bought a bunch of snacks at Koba Mart…
…Maybe she went to her friend on Mt. Takanosu?

What should I do…?  
I'll go check it out…
Ryunosuke-san is going to Mt. Takanosu!

Looks like it…  
What should we do from here?
Follow Ryunosuke
Worry about Hizuru
Let's go after Ryunosuke.
Ryunosuke was killed by Heine, the teacher said.

I don't know what I can do in this situation…  
But we need to watch Ryunosuke!
Got it, let's go!

This is bad…  
Where's the teacher?
Wait, what's going on?

Ryunosuke was killed by Heine.  
The teacher said that.  
If this is today…

Ryunosuke's in danger.  
I'm going to find the teacher!
